resources.string: This screen explains the local safety contract for capability %1$s before Charge Pilot attempts experimental settings writes.
Charge Pilot stores attempts on this device and does not upload operation history. The capability registry is bundled in the APK; no network fetch is performed.
Only continue when you initiated the setup or toggle action.
Confirm charger, battery, foreground app, and brand-specific requirements in Home.
For Full builds, Shizuku control requires Shizuku installed, running, and authorized.
Samsung Game Booster bypass still depends on Samsung firmware accepting the Game Optimizing Service path.
I understand this is experimental and may not work on my firmware
I understand Charge Pilot will write a system setting only when I confirm
This capability is not available on this device profile.
